roadmap.milestone_count_rationale: 5 milestones: beginner with 10 h/wk and an extreme gap from AI intern to Big Four AI/Full-stack Solutions Engineer. This count balances comprehensive coverage with the user's limited time budget.

vision_profile.current_state: An AI intern with foundational knowledge in AI, ML, Git, GitHub, and Full-stack development.
vision_profile.main_blocker: The biggest obstacle is transforming broad foundational knowledge into specific, production-ready skills and a portfolio tailored for Big Four full-time roles.
vision_profile.top_motivation: Priyamvada wants to secure a full-time position at a prestigious Big Four company to advance her career in AI and full-stack development.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: The learner can build and deploy foundational AI models within a robust backend framework, demonstrating core software engineering practices for production environments.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules are necessary to establish a solid foundation in core AI/ML, robust backend development, and essential project collaboration skills.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building the bedrock of your AI engineering career, transforming from an intern into a capable AI Foundations Engineer ready for production challenges.

project.title: AI-Powered Recommendation Service Backend
project.description: Build a backend service for a simple recommendation engine. The service will take user input, process it with a basic AI model, and return recommendations via an API. Focus on clean code, API design, and basic deployment.
project.deliverable: A deployed backend API service with documented endpoints and a basic AI model integration.
seeded_errors: The recommendation API returns inconsistent results due to unhandled edge cases in data preprocessing, requiring the learner to implement robust data validation and error handling.

modules.title: Core AI/ML Principles & Python for Production
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to establish foundational programming, AI theory, and robust software engineering principles.

skills.title: Python for AI
skills.why_this_skill: Python is the lingua franca of AI, and mastering its production-ready aspects is crucial for building reliable AI systems in a Big Four environment.

skills.title: Deep Learning Basics
skills.why_this_skill: A deep understanding of ML principles is essential to effectively apply, debug, and explain AI models, a core expectation in Big Four roles.

skills.title: OOP & SOLID Principles
skills.why_this_skill: Writing clean, maintainable, and scalable code using OOP and SOLID principles is fundamental for any Big Four software engineering role, especially in AI.

science.desc: A Python script for data preprocessing fails intermittently in a production-like environment due to unexpected data types, requiring debugging and robust error handling.

modules.title: Robust Backend Development with AI Integration
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to build a functional and well-structured backend for AI services.

skills.title: API Design & Service Layer
skills.why_this_skill: Designing clean, efficient, and scalable APIs is critical for integrating AI models into larger systems, a core task in Big Four projects.
lessons: RESTful API Design for AI Services

video.title: RESTful API Design for AI Services

skills.title: Web Frameworks (FastAPI/Flask)
skills.why_this_skill: Proficiency in modern web frameworks is essential for deploying and serving AI models as robust and performant backend services.

skills.title: Database Design & Data Modeling
skills.why_this_skill: Effective database design is crucial for managing data for AI models, storing results, and ensuring data integrity in production systems.
lessons: Relational and NoSQL Databases for AI

video.title: Relational and NoSQL Databases for AI

science.desc: The AI model's API endpoint experiences slow response times under load, requiring the learner to identify bottlenecks and optimize API design or database queries.

modules.title: Data Handling & Version Control for AI Projects
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to ensure data quality, collaborative development, and code reliability.

skills.title: Data Wrangling
skills.why_this_skill: Clean and well-prepared data is the foundation of any successful AI project. Mastering data wrangling ensures reliable model inputs.

skills.title: Git & GitHub
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering Git and GitHub for team collaboration is non-negotiable in any professional software development setting, especially in Big Four firms.

skills.title: Testing & QA
skills.why_this_skill: Ensuring code quality through rigorous testing and efficient debugging is paramount for delivering reliable AI solutions in an enterprise setting.
lessons: Unit and Integration Testing for AI Code

video.title: Unit and Integration Testing for AI Code

science.desc: A team member's code merge breaks the main branch due to conflicting dependencies, requiring the learner to resolve merge conflicts and implement better Git practices.
Explain how you would design a scalable API for an AI-powered service, considering data input, model inference, and output handling. Discuss potential challenges and solutions.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: The learner can design, implement, and deploy scalable machine learning models as robust API services, demonstrating proficiency in feature engineering, model evaluation, and API security.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules are crucial to advance ML application, build scalable API services, and ensure model reliability and security in production.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into an Applied ML Engineer, capable of transforming raw data into intelligent, deployable solutions that power real-world applications.

project.title: Scalable Fraud Detection API
project.description: Develop a fraud detection API that uses a trained ML model. The service should handle concurrent requests, integrate with a database, and include basic monitoring. Focus on API scalability, model performance, and security considerations.
project.deliverable: A deployed, scalable fraud detection API with a trained ML model, including monitoring dashboards and security configurations.
seeded_errors: The fraud detection model exhibits significant bias towards certain user demographics, leading to unfair predictions. The learner must identify the bias and propose/implement a mitigation strategy.

modules.title: Advanced Machine Learning & Feature Engineering
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to deepen ML knowledge, focusing on practical application and model understanding.

skills.title: Supervised Learning
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering supervised learning algorithms and their practical application is fundamental for solving a wide range of business problems with AI.

skills.title: Feature Engineering & Pipelines
skills.why_this_skill: Effective feature engineering is crucial for maximizing model performance, and building robust pipelines ensures reproducibility and scalability in ML workflows.

skills.title: Model Debugging & Explainability
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding why models make certain predictions and effectively debugging them is vital for building trust and ensuring reliability in enterprise AI solutions.

science.desc: A newly deployed ML model shows degraded performance in production compared to development. Diagnose the cause (e.g., data drift, concept drift) and propose a solution.

modules.title: Scalable API Development & Microservices
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to design and optimize scalable API services for ML models.

skills.title: Microservices Architecture
skills.why_this_skill: Designing modular and scalable microservices is essential for building complex AI systems that can evolve and scale with business needs.

skills.title: Concurrency & Multithreading
skills.why_this_skill: Optimizing AI services for performance often requires handling concurrent requests efficiently, making concurrency a vital skill for scalable systems.

skills.title: Caching & Performance Optimization
skills.why_this_skill: Optimizing the performance of AI services through caching and other techniques is crucial for meeting latency requirements in production.

science.desc: The API for your ML service experiences a sudden spike in latency, impacting user experience. Identify the root cause (e.g., database bottleneck, inefficient caching) and optimize.

modules.title: Model Evaluation, Monitoring & Security
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to ensure deployed ML models are secure, performant, and continuously monitored.

skills.title: Monitoring & Observability
skills.why_this_skill: Implementing MLOps practices and robust monitoring is essential for maintaining the health and performance of AI models in production environments.

skills.title: Security & Compliance
skills.why_this_skill: Securing AI models and their APIs against vulnerabilities is paramount for protecting sensitive data and maintaining trust in enterprise applications.
lessons: API Security Best Practices for AI

video.title: API Security Best Practices for AI

skills.title: API Design & Service Layer
skills.why_this_skill: Efficiently serving ML models via APIs is the final step to bringing AI solutions to users, requiring knowledge of deployment strategies and infrastructure.

science.desc: A security vulnerability is reported in your ML API. Identify the vulnerability (e.g., unauthenticated access, data leakage) and implement a fix.
Describe your approach to deploying a machine learning model as a scalable and secure API service. What MLOps practices would you incorporate?

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: The learner can build complete, interactive AI-powered web applications, integrating advanced frontend frameworks with robust backend AI services and ensuring a seamless user experience.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules are essential to cover modern frontend development, seamless AI integration, and robust cloud deployment for full-stack AI applications.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a Full-Stack AI Developer, capable of bringing AI solutions to life through engaging user interfaces and powerful, integrated systems.

project.title: Interactive AI Chatbot Web Application
project.description: Build a full-stack web application featuring an interactive AI chatbot. The frontend will use a modern framework to communicate with a backend AI service. Focus on user experience, real-time interaction, and secure deployment.
project.deliverable: A deployed, interactive full-stack web application with an integrated AI chatbot, demonstrating real-time communication and a responsive UI.
seeded_errors: The chatbot occasionally generates irrelevant or nonsensical responses due to poor prompt engineering or context management. The learner must refine the AI interaction logic and improve prompt design.

modules.title: Modern Frontend Development for AI Apps
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to build responsive and user-friendly interfaces for AI applications.

skills.title: Frontend Frameworks (React/Vue/Angular)
skills.why_this_skill: Proficiency in modern frontend frameworks is crucial for building interactive and dynamic user interfaces for AI-powered web applications.

skills.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
skills.why_this_skill: Handling asynchronous operations is fundamental for fetching data from AI backend services without blocking the user interface, ensuring a smooth user experience.

skills.title: SOLID Principles
skills.why_this_skill: Designing intuitive and user-friendly interfaces is critical for the adoption and success of AI applications, especially in enterprise contexts.

science.desc: Users report slow loading times and unresponsive UI in the AI web application. Diagnose frontend performance bottlenecks and propose optimizations.

modules.title: Integrating AI into Full-Stack Applications
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to securely and efficiently connect frontend and backend AI services.

skills.title: API Design & Service Layer
skills.why_this_skill: Seamless integration between frontend and AI backend services is crucial for building cohesive and functional full-stack AI applications.
lessons: Connecting Frontend to AI Backend APIs

video.title: Connecting Frontend to AI Backend APIs

skills.title: Authentication & Authorization
skills.why_this_skill: Implementing robust authentication and authorization is critical for securing full-stack AI applications and protecting user data in enterprise environments.

skills.title: Algorithms & Data Handling
skills.why_this_skill: Enabling real-time communication is often necessary for interactive AI applications like chatbots or live dashboards, enhancing user experience.
lessons: Implementing WebSockets for Live AI Updates

video.title: Implementing WebSockets for Live AI Updates

science.desc: The AI backend service is not consistently receiving data from the frontend due to CORS issues or incorrect API endpoints. Debug the integration problem.

modules.title: Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD for Full-Stack AI
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to deploy and manage full-stack AI applications on cloud infrastructure with automated pipelines.

skills.title: Cloud & Deployment
skills.why_this_skill: Deploying full-stack AI applications on cloud platforms is a standard practice in Big Four firms, requiring knowledge of cloud services and infrastructure.
lessons: Cloud Deployment Strategies for Full-Stack AI

video.title: Cloud Deployment Strategies for Full-Stack AI

skills.title: CI/CD
skills.why_this_skill: Automating the deployment process through CI/CD pipelines ensures rapid, reliable, and consistent delivery of full-stack AI applications.

skills.title: Containerization (Docker)
skills.why_this_skill: Containerization with Docker is a standard for packaging and deploying full-stack AI applications consistently across different environments.

science.desc: A new feature deployment breaks the existing AI functionality in production. Rollback the deployment and fix the CI/CD pipeline to prevent future regressions.
Walk me through the architecture of a full-stack AI application, from frontend to backend, including how you would handle data flow, security, and deployment in a cloud environment.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: The learner can design and implement complex AI systems, including generative models and distributed architectures, demonstrating expertise in scalability, reliability, and advanced model techniques.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules are crucial to cover advanced generative AI, distributed system design, and large-scale data engineering for complex AI solutions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now an Advanced AI Solutions Architect, capable of envisioning and building sophisticated AI systems that push the boundaries of what's possible.

project.title: Distributed RAG System for Enterprise Knowledge Base
project.description: Design and implement a distributed Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that can query and synthesize information from a large enterprise knowledge base. Focus on distributed data storage, efficient retrieval, and scalable inference for the generative model.
project.deliverable: A deployed, distributed RAG system with a scalable backend, efficient retrieval mechanism, and a generative model capable of synthesizing information.
seeded_errors: The RAG system frequently hallucinates or retrieves irrelevant information due to poor chunking strategies and embedding quality. The learner must optimize data preparation and retrieval mechanisms.

modules.title: Generative AI & Advanced NLP
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to provide a strong foundation in modern generative AI and NLP techniques.

skills.title: Core Generative Model Families
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding diverse generative models is key to selecting and implementing the right AI solution for complex creative and data synthesis tasks.

skills.title: Transformers & Attention
skills.why_this_skill: Transformers are the backbone of modern NLP and generative AI. Deep understanding is essential for building and fine-tuning state-of-the-art models.

skills.title: Prompting & Inference Techniques
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering prompting and inference techniques is crucial for effectively interacting with and extracting desired outputs from generative AI models.

science.desc: A generative AI model deployed in production starts producing biased or toxic outputs. Identify the cause (e.g., training data, prompt injection) and implement safety measures.

modules.title: Distributed Systems & Scalability Patterns
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to master the principles for designing highly scalable and resilient distributed AI systems.

skills.title: Foundations of System Design
skills.why_this_skill: A strong foundation in system design principles is critical for architecting robust, scalable, and reliable AI solutions for enterprise clients.
lessons: Core Concepts of High-Level System Design

video.title: Core Concepts of High-Level System Design

skills.title: Distributed Systems
skills.why_this_skill: Designing and managing distributed systems is essential for building scalable and fault-tolerant AI infrastructure capable of handling large workloads.

skills.title: Scalability & Performance
skills.why_this_skill: Designing for scalability and optimizing performance are critical for Big Four AI solutions, ensuring they can handle growing data and user demands.
lessons: Scaling AI Systems for High Throughput

video.title: Scaling AI Systems for High Throughput

science.desc: Your distributed AI system experiences data consistency issues across nodes, leading to incorrect model predictions. Debug the distributed data flow and ensure consistency.

modules.title: Data Engineering for Large-Scale AI
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to manage and process large volumes of data efficiently for advanced AI models.

skills.title: Data Wrangling
skills.why_this_skill: Advanced data wrangling techniques are essential for preparing and cleaning large, complex datasets for high-performance AI models.

skills.title: Data Structures
skills.why_this_skill: Building efficient data pipelines is essential for ingesting, transforming, and delivering data to large-scale AI models reliably and continuously.
lessons: Designing ETL Pipelines for AI Data

video.title: Designing ETL Pipelines for AI Data

skills.title: Cloud Data Services (AWS S3, Lambda)
skills.why_this_skill: Leveraging cloud-native data services is crucial for building scalable, cost-effective, and managed data infrastructure for enterprise AI solutions.
lessons: Managing Data with AWS for AI

video.title: Managing Data with AWS for AI

science.desc: The data pipeline feeding your large-scale AI model fails to process new data efficiently, causing stale predictions. Optimize the data ingestion and processing pipeline.
How would you design a highly available and scalable distributed system for a real-time AI inference service, considering data consistency, fault tolerance, and latency?

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: The learner is fully prepared for Big Four interviews, possessing a strong portfolio of enterprise-grade AI solutions, and can articulate complex technical concepts and strategic implications.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules are crucial to cover strategic AI integration, consolidate learning into a strong portfolio, and provide targeted Big Four interview preparation.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a Big Four AI Solutions Consultant, equipped with the technical prowess and strategic thinking to excel in high-stakes enterprise AI roles.

project.title: Enterprise AI Strategy & Prototype for a Big Four Client
project.description: Act as a consultant for a hypothetical Big Four client. Identify a business problem, propose an AI solution, design its high-level architecture, and build a small-scale prototype or proof-of-concept. Focus on business value, technical feasibility, and clear communication.
project.deliverable: A comprehensive AI solution proposal document, a high-level architecture diagram, and a functional prototype demonstrating core AI capabilities.
seeded_errors: The proposed AI solution, while technically sound, fails to address key non-functional requirements (e.g., compliance, data privacy) critical for an enterprise client. The learner must revise the architecture to meet these constraints.

modules.title: AI-Powered Systems & Ethical AI
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to cover the strategic integration of AI, ethical considerations, and advanced security, crucial for consulting roles.

skills.title: AI-Powered Systems
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding how to integrate AI into core business logic and existing systems is key for delivering impactful enterprise AI solutions.

skills.title: GenAI & Responsible AI
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding and implementing ethical AI principles is paramount for Big Four consultants, ensuring solutions are fair, transparent, and compliant.
lessons: Ethics and Fairness in AI Systems

video.title: Ethics and Fairness in AI Systems

skills.title: Security & Compliance
skills.why_this_skill: Advanced security knowledge is essential for protecting sensitive data and AI models from sophisticated threats in enterprise environments.

skills.title: Foundations of System Design
skills.why_this_skill: Covers required domain: advanced_architecture

science.desc: A client expresses concerns about the ethical implications of your proposed AI solution. Address their concerns and propose safeguards or alternative approaches.

modules.title: Capstone Project & Portfolio Building
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills to consolidate learning into a strong portfolio piece and effectively communicate technical work.

skills.title: Project Planning & Management
skills.why_this_skill: Effective project planning and management are crucial for delivering complex AI solutions on time and within scope, a key skill for Big Four roles.

skills.title: Technical Documentation
skills.why_this_skill: Clear and concise technical documentation is vital for communicating complex AI solutions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders in Big Four settings.

skills.title: Portfolio Curation
skills.why_this_skill: A well-curated portfolio showcasing practical AI projects is your strongest asset for demonstrating capabilities to Big Four recruiters and hiring managers.

science.desc: During a client presentation, a stakeholder challenges the technical feasibility of a core component of your AI prototype. Defend your design choices and provide alternatives.

modules.title: Big Four Interview Preparation
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills specifically focused on preparing for and excelling in Big Four technical and behavioral interviews.

skills.title: Behavioral Interviewing
skills.why_this_skill: Excelling in behavioral interviews is crucial for demonstrating soft skills, leadership potential, and cultural fit, highly valued by Big Four firms.

skills.title: Technical Interviewing
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering technical interview questions, including coding and system design, is a direct requirement for securing full-time roles at Big Four companies.

skills.title: Case Studies
skills.why_this_skill: Applying system design and problem-solving skills to real-world case studies is a common interview format for Big Four roles, testing practical application.

science.desc: You are asked to debug a complex, multi-service AI application in a simulated production environment with limited access. Identify the faulty service and propose a fix.

You're interviewing for a Big Four AI Solutions Engineer role. Design an end-to-end AI system for [a complex problem, e.g., predictive maintenance for industrial machinery], discussing technical tradeoffs, scalability, and business impact.
